info.title: Personal Finance Hub API
info.description: Phase 2 REST contract. Monetary values and exchange rates are decimal strings. Web sessions keep access tokens in memory and refresh tokens in secure HttpOnly cookies.

200.description: Accounts matching the requested archive state
Current-month dashboard in the user's timezone
